title: Palindrome
description: Given a string, determine whether it is a palindrome (reads the same forwards and backwards, ignoring case and non-alphanumeric characters). Print YES or NO.
outputSpec: YES if the string is a palindrome, NO otherwise.
constraints: 1 ≤ length ≤ 200. The string may contain letters, digits, spaces and punctuation.
exampleInput: A man a plan a canal Panama

tests.input: A man a plan a canal Panama
Was it a car or a cat I saw

botCodes.code:
import re
s = re.sub(r'[^a-z0-9]', '', input().lower())
print('YES' if s == s[::-1] else 'NO')
